comments: AccessScore is a free, open-source website accessibility checker with ADA legal risk assessment. Available as a web tool, npm CLI (npx accessscore), and GitHub Action (ryuno2525/accessscore-action).
features: Scans websites for 16 WCAG 2.1 Level A and AA criteria across images, structure, forms, and document metadata. Unique feature: quantifies estimated ADA legal risk exposure based on publicly available lawsuit settlement data. Provides prioritized fix plan with before/after code examples. Available as web scanner, npm CLI, and GitHub Action for CI/CD integration.
title: AccessScore — ADA Accessibility Checker with Legal Risk Assessment
